dataQualityFlag: Phillip Island Chocolate Factory is NOT on the Mornington Peninsula — do not include in any MP content (Viator error in competitor data).

entities.name: Peninsula Hot Springs

bathHouse.label: Bath House
bathHouse.description: Main bathing complex; 70+ experiences; the 'accessible' entry point

pricing.note: Prices NOT published on site — do not include specific prices without verifying directly. Range: ~$65 adult standard; earlybird from ~$45–60.

entities.knownIssue: Overcrowding in Bath House during peak periods (common visitor complaint)

entities.name: Alba Thermal Springs & Spa

pools.note: 22 geothermal pools confirmed on primary site. Urban List cited 31 — this is incorrect. Use 22.

entities.architecture: Brutalist; grand entryway; spiral staircase; clean lines

restaurant.name: Thyme
restaurant.note: Celebrity chef partnerships can change — verify current arrangement before publishing

entities.accommodationNote: The Sanctuary villas opened 2025; adults-only (18+); 7 units total (5 villas + 2 rooms); from $624/night

entities.name: Arthurs Seat Eagle
entities.address: 795 Arthurs Seat Road, Arthurs Seat VIC 3936
entities.accessibility: Wheelchair and pram accessible gondolas; Companion Card holders admitted free

pricing.note: LP cited $30.90 — outdated. Use official site price $32.50. Prices may change — verify before publishing.

hours.holidays: Extended in school and public holidays

entities.statusNote: Returned after brief COVID administration in March 2020. Confirmed operational.

entities.name: Ashcombe Maze & Lavender Gardens
entities.operatingStatusNote: NOT CLOSED. Some sources (including prior task research) incorrectly stated closure around 2020. Café re-opened January 2025. TripAdvisor reviews from Jan–Feb 2025 confirm operation. Thu–Mon only is a conversion-relevant detail.
entities.days: Thu–Mon 10am–5pm; closed Tue/Wed; open public holidays and school holidays

pricing.from: $15 per person (verify full breakdown on official site)

entities.note: Lower TripAdvisor score (3.7) may reflect price/experience mismatch — note this in content tone

entities.name: Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park
entities.tripadvisorRank: #1 attraction for Mornington Peninsula on Tripadvisor

pricing.note: Cannot verify on primary site (robots.txt blocks). Multiple third-party sources suggest $25–29. Verify before publishing.

entities.editorialNote: Tripadvisor #1 overall MP attraction yet receives almost no editorial coverage — strong content opportunity

entities.name: Polperro Dolphin Swims
entities.history: Established 1986 by Muir family; Victorian Tourism Awards Hall of Fame 2001 (environmental tourism)

pricing.swimTour: From ~$138–139 per adult (OTA 2025 — verify with Polperro directly)

entities.name: Sunny Ridge Strawberry Farm
entities.distribution: Distributed to Coles, Woolworths, Aldi nationally
entities.claimNote: Official site claims 'Australia's most trusted fresh strawberries' — NOT 'Australia's largest strawberry producer'. Do not use the 'largest' claim.

entities.name: Cape Schanck Lighthouse
entities.address: 420 Cape Schanck Lighthouse Road, Cape Schanck VIC 3939
entities.management: Within Mornington Peninsula National Park; managed by Parks Victoria
entities.nearby: Boardwalk to Pulpit Rock; basalt cliffs; Bushrangers Bay hike (5.4km return); whale spotting in season

entities.name: Pt. Leo Estate Sculpture Park

pricing.note: Verified Jan 2026 on primary site. Verify before publishing.

entities.notableArtists: Yayoi Kusama, KAWS (exhibitions rotate — verify current installations)

entities.name: Coolart Wetlands & Homestead
entities.hours: Daily 9am–5pm; gates close 5pm sharp; closed Christmas Day
entities.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; wheelchairs available to borrow from Visitor Centre

entities.name: Point Nepean National Park

shuttle.service: Hop-on hop-off shuttle to Fort Nepean

entities.fortNepean: No car access; walk ~3km from Gunner's Cottage carpark, cycle, or take shuttle
